channel.title: Eldritch on Baltic Vectors
channel.description: Recent content in Eldritch on Baltic Vectors

item.title: Embrace the freaks - not everything has to be a humanoid
item.description:
This post is basically a mini rant and dive into a couple papers I found a delight to learn about. If you’re a little fatigued from the current humanoid status quo like me, and want a bit of a respite this is the read for you.

Why the fatigue?

There is a LOT of hype. So many startups that you can’t even comfortably fit all the companies on a map for China. Bank of America forecasts 3 billion clankers by 2060. We’re talking predictions of smartphone level of adoption.
